calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2003 Off Calendar

Compromise Of Incompetent Claim In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 24, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Loretta Majera. Tom Paoli, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Mauro Ilagan. Leonarda Tiamzon, Guardian ad Litem was sworn and examined. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing grants compromise as follows: Mecial Liens $24,898.00, Attorney Fees: $270,000.00, Costs: $6,293.25 and $373,808.77 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of Anerica, San Francisco. Order signed in open court.
